name: Daiwa Scarlet | Trainer’s Prize
description:
"I’m sure we can find something a little more exciting to do."

After winning the URA finals, it was time for Scarlet and you, as her trainer, to part ways. Unable to let go yet, she asks you to travel with her. Now on the beaches of Hawaii, Scarlet dressed right for the occasion and now wants to sweep you off your feet.

(Some guy stole my balls and forced me to make this)
